steps.title: Identify the grammar issue
steps.content: The true subject is the presence (singular). The long relative clause "of many fossilized microbacteria, which seem to have thrived there..." modifies "presence" but does not change its number. Strip it away: "the presence ______ claims that bacteria are among the planet's most resilient organisms."

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A: reinforce — plural base form. "The presence reinforce" — subject-verb mismatch. Eliminated.

B: have reinforced — plural auxiliary "have." Same number error. Eliminated.

C: reinforces — singular third-person present (-s ending). "The presence reinforces claims" — subject and verb agree. Correct.

D: are reinforcing — plural auxiliary "are." Also a number error. Eliminated.
